titleStmt.title: SII 28.59: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 59. (A.R. No. 58 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, west wall.

This records the gift of 1/4 vēli of land (boundaries specified in Perumūr which was his own kāṇi, as kāśu-koḷḷā-iṟaili. (Land made tax-free without getting any compensatory kāśu-money) for meeting the expenses on the requirements for the festival on the day of the asterism Tiruvādirai in the month of Chittirai for god Gaṇapatīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi in Margugal-nāḍu in Mummuḍichōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by Tāyan Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyān who had the kāṇi of Īkkāḍu alias Perumūr (in the above stated nāḍu) who is named as Perumūr-uḍaiyān in the concluding part by his succssors in the family. The gift was made in the name of Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēvar, the principal servant of God Gaṇapatīśvaraṁ-uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravartikaḷ śrīrājendracoḻatevaṟku � 3 Āvatu mummuṭi coḻavaḷanāṭṭu marukalnāṭṭu tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭi Uṭaiyār gaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiyār mulabhṛttyarākiya Āticaṇḍe
śvaratevaṟkku Ināṭṭu Īkkāṭāṉa perumurkāṇi Uṭaiyatāyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāneṉ Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa perumuril Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Ivūr nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Innilattukku
vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ittevar paḻantevatānattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eṅkaḷūr nirpāyum vāykkālukku teṟkum Ivvicainta Innāṉkellai naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kha Innilaṅkālum Ittevar cittirai tiruvātirait tirunāḷu .
kku veṇṭum Aḻivukku Uṭalākaviṭṭu Innilattukku veṇṭum Iṟai nānum Eṉ Aṉṉuvayattārume Iṟukka Itu kācu koḷḷā Iṟaiyili Āka ceytu koṭutten perumuruṭaiyān tāyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāneṉ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 28.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
